**Validator Name:** Node39

**Current Networks** (Mainnet): 

• Terra2 ($LUNA)
• Shentu ($CTK)
• Lava ($LAVA)
• Nibiru ($NIBI)
• Canton ($C)
• Espresso ($ESP)
• Elys ($ELYS)
• Bitbadges ($BADGE)
• CosmosHub ($ATOM)
• Beezee ($BZE)
• Arkeo ($ARKEO)
• Axone ($AXONE)
• Hippo ($HP)
• Kiichain ($KII)
• Sunrise ($RISE)
• Union ($U)
• Paxi ($PAXI)
• Pactus ($PAC)
• Muon ($MUON)
• Massa ($MAS)

**Total AuM:** ~$200K

**Contact details:**

• Website: https://node39.top
• X: https://x.com/Node39_
• Discord: node39
• Email: kenny@node39.top

**Why We're Interested in Validating on gno.land:**

We want to join the validator set to contribute reliable, secure, and highly available infrastructure to the network. As a professional node operator with experience running validators across multiple blockchain ecosystems, Node39 is committed to maintaining high uptime, participating in governance, and supporting the community with operational expertise, automation, and infrastructure best practices. We believe that a diverse and decentralized validator set strengthens the network, and we are excited to contribute to its long term growth and resilience.
